layout_snapshot.composition_notes: Clean split-screen division to showcase the UI screen recording while maintaining eye contact with the speaker.
layout_snapshot.layer_stack_description: Split screen layout with Claude terminal screen recording on the top half, talking head speaker on the bottom half, and a persistent caption box overlaid at the center boundary split.

negative_observations: No zooming, keyframed motion, text formatting changes, or floating graphic stickers in this span.
evidence.review_notes: The transition at the end of the span (00:02:21) skips idle typing delay in the screen recording while maintaining split-screen alignment.

visual_craft_events.recreation_relevance: Highly relevant to establish visual pacing.
visual_craft_events.sync_observation: The hard cut aligns perfectly with the start of the word 'They' and beat_0005 audio onset.
visual_craft_events.visible_evidence: Hard cut transition to start the split-screen sequence.

visual_craft_events.sync_observation: Terminal animation syncs with voiceover talking about opening and using Claude Code.
visual_craft_events.visible_evidence: Simulated high-speed typing animation of the text 'Calculating...' and then 'Thinking...' inside the Claude Code CLI window.

visual_craft_events.recreation_relevance: Important to keep CLI demonstration pacing highly responsive.
visual_craft_events.review_reason: The candidate cut has low detector confidence but shows a clear abrupt jump in CLI output.
visual_craft_events.sync_observation: Aligns with the candidate cut at edit_boundary_0002 and beat_0006.
visual_craft_events.visible_evidence: A sharp jump cut is visible in the terminal CLI state, jumping to print 'Flibbertigibbet...' to fast-track user-experience delay.
